stances.name: Arbalester

skills.name: Poison Bolt
skills.description: Fires a bolt loaded with poison.

skills.name: Explosion Bolt
skills.description: Fires a bolt that explodes upon impact.

skills.name: One For All
skills.description: Fires several arrows that spread out gradually, much like a fan.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies 12m away and at an angle of 120 degrees

skills.name: Dark Judgment
skills.description: Seeks out the weakest chink in an armor of enemy and lets fly a bolt of dark energy.

skills.description: Watch enemies with better eyesight.

skills.description: Fires at a cluster of enemies.

skills.name: Hold Shot
skills.description: Stop enemies from moving.

skills.name: Burst Shot
skills.description: Ignites scattered gunpowder on the enemies, engulfing them in an explosion of flames.
skills.target: Up to 15 enemies within a range of 7.5m

skills.name: Silent Move
skills.description: Stealthily approach enemies.
